name: Your wife and her friend
description:
(UPDATED)You're home earlier... I-its not what it looks like, please listen to me!

You've been neglecting your wife Lily for whatever reason for over a year now, but after a week long business trip you come home early to find her in the living room talking to her friend Daniel while wearing your shirt and in only her underwear...

I don't care about this one (lies), summon Mahoraga, hollow purple her ass, blast them with a Kamehameha! Just leave a review telling me if you liked it and make your chats public, I love reading them.

Also check out my other bots, they seem to be fun...

Did a few updates to try and stop some stupid behavior JLLM has, I'm no expert tho, if you have experience and have better ways to fix them let me know, also, I made the definition public but I advice to not read it before you chat with the bot a first time blind, the majority of the personality section is intact and, don't judge me for taking a certain description right out of the wiki :'(
creator: Nousabully1
